creator: cjr@cruwe.de
text:
mail/wanderlust devel uses SNAPDATE=20120102 and SNAPTIME=0309, although the laset snapshot is from 20120923.

With IMAP/SSL, wanderlust (stable AND devel) complains about an invalidly defined ssl-function. The issue seems to be fixed with the latest developlemt snapshot.

Attached patch upgrade mail/wanderlust-devel to the latest development snapshot.

Fix: apply attached patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: NA
